title: Best Auckland Day Trips for Families — Within 2 Hours of the CBD
meta_desc: Discover the best Auckland day trips for families within 2 hours of the CBD, including Waiheke Island and Hobbiton
intro: Looking for a quick escape from Auckland city with the kids? Within 2 hours of the CBD, you can find stunning beaches, adventure activities, and even a real-life movie set. From Waiheke Island to Hobbiton, we've got the inside scoop on the best Auckland day trips for families.

sections.heading: Waiheke Island: A Family Paradise
sections.body: Waiheke Island is a 35-minute ferry ride from Auckland's CBD and offers a range of family-friendly activities, including beautiful beaches, vineyards, and olive groves. You can rent bikes or take a guided tour to explore the island. Prices for the ferry start at $42 return for adults and $22 return for children aged 5-15, while kids under 5 travel free.

sections.heading: Waitomo and Hobbiton: A Magical Adventure
list: Waitomo Glowworm Caves: $63 per adult, $33 per child (4-14 years)
Hobbiton Movie Set: $89 per adult, $44 per child (9-16 years), free for children under 9 years
Drive time from Auckland: approximately 2 hours to Waitomo and 2.5 hours to Matamata for Hobbiton

sections.heading: Coromandel Peninsula: Beaches and Forests
sections.body: The Coromandel Peninsula is a 2-hour drive from Auckland's CBD and offers a range of family-friendly activities, including beautiful beaches, forests, and the famous Hot Water Beach. You can take a guided tour or explore the area on your own. Prices for activities vary, but you can expect to pay around $20-$50 per person for a guided tour.

sections.heading: Tips and Essentials
list: Check the weather forecast before heading out
Book activities and tours in advance to avoid sold-out situations
Consider renting a campervan for a more flexible and comfortable trip (prices start at $100 per day)

cta.text: Get a quote for a campervan rental
Use our free NZ family travel budget calculator
